framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2ND WAVE cruise+drones at Israel, Iran new wave missiles Sunday
history.note: Day 34 PM. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED: (1) Houthis SECOND WAVE — cruise missiles + drones at Israel targeting military sites (NYT/Guardian/HindustanTimes). Confirms INDEPENDENT SUSTAINED capability, not one-off; (2) Iran fired NEW WAVE of missiles at Israel on Sunday (The Hindu); (3) IRGC attacked aluminium smelters in Bahrain (ALBA, 2 wounded) + UAE (EGA) — ECONOMIC INFRASTRUCTURE targeting = NEW escalation dimension (AJE); (4) UAE air defenses ACTIVELY ENGAGING missiles+drones, sounds across country; (5) Kuwait intercepting attacks early Sunday; (6) Saudi intercepted 10 drones; (7) IRGC threatened US university campuses in Gulf (NYU Abu Dhabi, Texas A&M Qatar); (8) US/Israeli strikes hit Iran port city near Hormuz (ArabNews); (9) Iran found 120+ unexploded cluster bombs in southern province; (10) IDF soldier killed in southern Lebanon; (11) US Marines arriving in region; (12) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ) on top of 7,000 already en route = potential 17K ground force. IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time but Houthis 2nd wave + economic targeting + Gulf-wide strikes = WAR WIDENING across all dimensions. Source: NYT/Guardian/AJE/HindustanTimes/CBS/ArabNews/TheHindu/Reuters

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2ND WAVE sustained, Iran new wave at Israel Sunday, UAE 16 missiles+42 drones/24h

Our missiles are in place. Waiting for US troops on ground'; (7) 2,500 US Marines ARRIVED in region (AP Mar 29); (8) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ); (9) US KIA: 15 confirmed + 332 wounded (Wikipedia); (10) Iran: 2,076 killed + 26,500 injured (Health Ministry); HRANA: 3,461 killed; Hengaw: 6,900 killed. IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over, BUT 3 INDEPENDENT fronts now active (IRGC residual + Houthis sustained + Hezbollah surge). Source: AP/IDF/UAE MoD/Guardian/Fars/WSJ/Wikipedia/JPost

history.note: Day 37 PM. ★★★★★ TRANSIT SIGNALS: (1) ★★★ Bloomberg Mar 30: TWO COSCO Shipping Corp container ships exited Hormuz — FIRST major Chinese state-backed company vessels since war began; (2) ★★★ Bessent (Treasury Sec): 'Over time, US is going to retake control of the straits, freedom of navigation through US escorts or multinational escort' (Bloomberg); (3) Rubio: Pentagon 'preparing optionality' for Hormuz (ABC); (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) Iran blocked previous Chinese ships Mar 27 BUT now allowing COSCO = ESCALATION OF FRIENDLY ACCESS; (6) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (7) Oxford: impassable until May; (8) Brent USD115.35 (+2.47%). COSCO transit = significant — if state-backed Chinese majors flowing, trickle may accelerate. Bessent 'retake' = strongest US official statement on Hormuz control yet. Source: Bloomberg/ABC/Sky/USNI

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, 2 COSCO state ships transited Monday, Trump 20-ship claim UNVERIFIED)
history.note: Day 38. ★★★ TRANSIT: (1) Reuters Mar 30: 2 COSCO Shipping Corp container ships passed through Hormuz on 2ND ATTEMPT Monday — first major Chinese state-backed company vessels since war; (2) NYT: Chinese ships transited suggesting Iran 'could be relaxing stranglehold' but shows 'Tehran's enduring control'; (3) Trump claimed 20 ships allowed Monday — UNVERIFIED; (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) NPR: Iran parliament pursuing formal codification of Hormuz sovereignty + fee collection; (6) Bessent: 'US will retake control of straits through escorts'; (7) Netanyahu: floated rerouting all Gulf energy pipelines across Saudi to Red Sea to Israeli ports — long-term bypass plan; (8) ~3,000 vessels still waiting; (9) IRGC yuan-denominated toll via Larak. COSCO transit = significant signal but macro picture unchanged: 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Reuters/NYT/NPR/CBS/Bloomberg

Still 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Bloomberg/Reuters/NYT/NPR/USNI/CBS

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: STALLED — China-Pakistan 5pt plan presented but Iran REJECTED China mediation
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 40. ★★★★ SETBACK: (1) VOR News Mar 31: Iran REJECTED China mediation offer — "open to mediation in broad terms" but "actions show very little room for compromise"; (2) Zhai Jun still active behind scenes (VOR); (3) China-Pakistan 5pt plan formally presented Tue (Axios/Reuters) but no acceptance; (4) CGTN Mar 27: Wang Yi met UK NSA + called France + urged Pakistan/Egypt/Turkey/Iran to "seize every window"; (5) COSCO 2 ships transited = economic backing; (6) No Chinese NAVAL deployment. fp1 NOT TRIGGERED — formal plan exists but Iran rejection = dead letter without leverage. Source: VOR/Axios/Reuters/CGTN

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: PEAK INCOHERENCE — "finish line" + "2-3 weeks" vs IRGC targets 18 US companies TODAY
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 40. ★★★★★ MAXIMUM PARADOX: (1) Trump Apr 1: "could end war in 2-3 weeks" (Reuters); (2) Hegseth: can see "finish line" (Reuters); (3) BUT IRGC named 18 US companies (Apple/Google/Microsoft/Tesla/Boeing/IBM/Intel) — threatens attacks starting Apr 1 20:00 Tehran (WIRED/Reuters/IndiaToday); (4) White House: military "ready to curtail" IRGC attacks on US firms; (5) Apr 6 energy destruction deadline = 5 DAYS; (6) Iran denied any negotiations, called Trump "deceitful"; (7) No DFC escort completed; (8) Brent near USD120 after tanker attack; (9) Gas USD4+; (10) Hegseth previously CONCEDED Iran retains strike ability. Signal: US declaring victory while Iran ESCALATING target set from military to civilian corporate infrastructure. Source: Reuters/WIRED/CNBC/IndiaToday

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.status: DEADLOCKED — Multiple frameworks (US 15pt, China-Pak 5pt, Iran 5pt counter) but ALL rejected, NO talks scheduled
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 40. ★★★★★ FRAMEWORK PROLIFERATION: (1) China-Pakistan 5-point peace plan formally presented Tue (Axios/Reuters): IMMEDIATE ceasefire + swift peace talks + Hormuz reopening = most comprehensive framework yet; (2) Pakistan Quad (SA/Turkey/Egypt) met Sunday — Guardian calls embryo of 'new order'; (3) Iran's own 5-point counter demands reparations + Hormuz sovereignty; (4) US 15-point plan rejected by Iran as excessive; (5) NYT Mar 31: 'no negotiations yet scheduled between major combatants'; (6) Iran FM Araghchi insists ceasefire BEFORE talks; (7) Trump insists talks BEFORE ceasefire; (8) Senate War Powers blocked 53-47, House delayed mid-April; (9) Apr 6 energy destruction deadline = 5 DAYS. fp3 NOW PARTIALLY ACTIVE — multiple competing frameworks exist (China-Pak 5pt, Pak Quad, Iran 5pt, US 15pt) but NO convergence. Need: direct talks or mutual acceptance of any framework. Source: Axios/Reuters/Guardian/NYT/ForeignPolicy

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.status: ALL BARRIERS BREACHED + NEW DIMENSION: IRGC targeting US corporate infrastructure in Gulf
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 40. ★★★★★ NEW COST DIMENSION: (1) IRGC threatens 18 US companies operations in Gulf — Apple/Google/Microsoft/Tesla/Boeing/IBM/Intel showrooms/offices/Superchargers (WIRED/Electrek); (2) Gas USD4.018/gal nationally = 2022 high (Axios/Reuters); (3) Brent near USD120 after tanker attack (CNBC); (4) US KIA: 13-15 + 300+ wounded; (5) Iran HRANA 3,486+ killed; (6) Apr 6 energy deadline = 5 DAYS; (7) Moody recession probability 49%; (8) Dow +1100 then volatility; (9) CORPORATE COST NOW DIRECT — companies evacuating Gulf staff = NEW political pressure channel on US administration. Source: WIRED/Electrek/Reuters/CNBC/Axios

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
